content.question: Do long-run (age 25-35) labor-market earnings and employment gains for students admitted to 6/8-year gimnázium persist after controlling for actual educational attainment (credential completion), or are they zero-sum redistributions?
content.reduction_path: Conduct longitudinal follow-up study of Hungarian cohorts tracked through ages 25-35 with administrative wage/employment records and detailed educational credential data, comparing labor outcomes of admitted versus non-admitted students with similar test-score propensity
